name: Hero Split
description: Split hero section with media (logo or image) on one side and text with CTAs on the other. Supports breathing gradient orbs background, pill-shaped buttons, and responsive stacking. The split layout places emphasis on brand identity alongside a clear value proposition.

standard.description: Media on left (1/3 width) with logo or image, content on right (2/3 width) with title, tagline, and pill CTA buttons. Background features breathing gradient orbs with blur. Responsive: stacks vertically on mobile with media on top.

slots.media-area: Left column at flex: 0 0 35%, centered content. Contains logo or hero image with float animation and drop-shadow. Wrapper: _flex _items[center] _justify[center]
slots.title: Large heading with _heading1 _fw800 _lh[1.1] _ls[-0.03em] _mb7. Supports inline accent color spans for punctuation or keywords.
slots.tagline: Supporting paragraph with _body _fgmuted/60 _mw[540px] _lh[1.75] _mb10. Supports inline accent spans with _fgprimary _fw700 _italic.
slots.cta-group: Horizontal button group with _flex _gap4 _flexwrap. Contains primary pill Button (rounded-full, shadow) and ghost pill Button (border, transparent bg).

reversed.description: Content on left (2/3 width) with title, tagline, and CTA buttons. Media on right (1/3 width) with image or illustration. Same breathing orb background. Good for right-handed visual emphasis.

slots.title: Large heading on the left with _heading1 _fw800 _lh[1.1] _ls[-0.03em] _mb7
slots.cta-group: Horizontal button group with _flex _gap4, primary pill + ghost pill Buttons
slots.media-area: Right column at flex: 0 0 35%, contains hero image or illustration with float animation

centered.description: Centered single-column layout with media above and text below. Logo/image centered at top, followed by centered title, tagline, and CTA buttons. Good for simpler landing pages.

slots.media-area: Centered image/logo above text with _mb8, max-width constrained
slots.title: Centered heading with _heading1 _fw800 _lh[1.1] _mb6 _text[center]
slots.cta-group: Centered button group with _flex _gap4 _justify[center], pill Buttons

slots.media-area: Logo or hero image area (1/3 width)
slots.title: Primary heading with accent punctuation
slots.tagline: Supporting paragraph with accent inline spans

visual_brief: Two-column section with a media area (logo or hero image) taking roughly one-third width on the left and a text content area on the right. The text area contains a large primary heading with accent-colored punctuation, a supporting tagline paragraph with accent-colored inline spans, and a row of pill-shaped CTA buttons (primary filled, secondary outlined). Background features breathing gradient orbs with slow animation. Reversed preset flips the columns. Centered preset stacks both columns vertically with centered alignment.

responsive.mobile: Columns stack vertically — media on top, text content below. CTA buttons go full-width stacked. Gradient orbs scale down or simplify.
responsive.tablet: Side-by-side layout maintained with tighter proportions. Media area shrinks to 40% width.
responsive.desktop: Full split layout with generous whitespace. Media at one-third, content at two-thirds. Orbs animate at full size.

layout_hints.narrative_split: The media side should support the value proposition, not compete with it. Preserve a clear left-right hierarchy where one side establishes proof or brand and the other carries the decision-making copy.
layout_hints.cta_rhythm: Primary and secondary actions should read as one compact decision cluster below the core message rather than stretching the hero vertically.
layout_hints.mobile_stack: When stacked, keep media, heading, supporting copy, and CTAs in a confident narrative order so the hero still feels intentional on small screens.

motion.micro: CTAs and media elements may float or sharpen subtly on hover, but the hero should remain composed and premium rather than restless.
motion.transitions: Hero entry and background orbs should move slowly and confidently, reinforcing atmosphere without distracting from copy.

keyboard: Primary and secondary hero actions should be easy to reach in order after the main message.
announcements: Heading, supporting message, and the relationship between media and CTA context should be understandable without relying on visual split composition alone.
